name: Ethyca
description: Ethyca — Developer-first data privacy platform for automating data discovery, consent, and subject request workflows.

seo.title: Ethyca — DBaaS / Serverless Databases
seo.meta_description: Ethyca: Ethyca — Developer-first data privacy platform for automating data discovery, consent, and subject request workflows.

when_to_use: Automating GDPR data subject access and deletion requests
Data discovery and PII flow mapping across microservices
Consent management integrated with developer workflows
Privacy compliance automation without manual legal reviews
Building privacy-by-design systems with Fides open-source SDK

pros: Developer-first privacy platform with OSS Fides core
Consent management with real infrastructure ties
Strong Python SDK and CI integrations
cons: Smaller brand than OneTrust or Transcend
Setup requires mapping actual data systems
review.verdict: Best privacy platform for engineering teams wanting code-first compliance, less fit for legal-led privacy orgs.
review.best_for: Engineering-led privacy programs wanting code-first DSR automation and OSS foundation
review.not_for: Legal-first privacy teams who prefer OneTrust's GRC-style workflows

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
